issue: APEX Agent making scheduled API calls causing cost bleed

root_cause.mechanism: Schedule loop calling Claude API every 30 minutes indefinitely

code_section.problem: Infinite loop calling run_cycle() every 30 minutes regardless of incoming commands

api_call_analysis.lines_241_280: Makes Claude API call via make_claude_call() to claude-sonnet-4-20250514 with max_tokens=800
api_call_analysis.cost_per_call: Approx $0.006-0.01 per call (Sonnet 4 pricing: input ~$3/MTok, output ~$15/MTok)
api_call_analysis.call_frequency: Every 30 minutes, 24/7 = 48 calls/day = 1,440 calls/month = ~$7-14/month continuous drain
api_call_analysis.cost_guard: Has cost_guard check (line 256) but only blocks if cost exceeds threshold — does NOT prevent scheduled calls
api_call_analysis.condition_check: Lines 249-252 skip LLM call if blocked AND cooldown active, but when alert_due=true, it ALWAYS calls Claude even with no new commands

problematic_code_snippet.content:
# If blocked and alert not due, skip the LLM call entirely — save tokens
        if state['blocked_reason'] and not state['operator_alert_due']:
            log.info(f'Blocked ({state["blocked_reason"]}) and alert cooldown active — skipping LLM call')
            log.info('=== APEX CYCLE SKIPPED (blocked, cooldown) ===')
            return

        response = make_claude_call(
            agent_id='agent_apex_main',
            system_prompt=SYSTEM_PROMPT,
            messages=[{
                'role': 'user',
                'content': f'Current state:\n{json.dumps(state, indent=2)}'
            }],
            model='claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
            max_tokens=800,
        )
problematic_code_snippet.issue: Even when BLOCKED, if cooldown has expired, it calls Claude with 800 tokens. Only skips on rare blocked+cooldown combo.

schedule_loop.code:
if __name__ == '__main__':
    log.info('APEX agent starting (v2)')
    run_cycle()
    schedule.every(30).minutes.do(run_cycle)
    while True:
        schedule.run_pending()
        time.sleep(60)
schedule_loop.behavior: Agent runs once at startup, then schedules run_cycle to fire every 30 minutes forever
schedule_loop.no_shutdown: The while True loop has no exit condition or signal handler
schedule_loop.no_command_trigger: Calls Claude on a timer, not based on external events (commands, Telegram messages, etc.)
schedule_loop.cost_consequence: ~$7-14/month continuous cost even when nothing needs to be decided

contributing_factor.detail: Claude is told it's APEX agent that must generate revenue, manage products, etc. Even in BLOCKED state, it generates decision JSON on every call, padding token count.
contributing_factor.model_choice: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 is expensive — Sonnet 4 costs 3x Haiku

comparison_to_audio_animation_agents.audio_agent: Runs every 60 seconds via cron but ONLY processes queue tasks — no API calls without work
comparison_to_audio_animation_agents.animation_agent: Runs every 60 seconds via cron but ONLY processes queue tasks — no API calls without work
comparison_to_audio_animation_agents.apex_agent: Runs every 30 minutes via schedule.every() and ALWAYS calls Claude, even with no work
comparison_to_audio_animation_agents.difference: Audio/Animation check for pending items; APEX makes decisions on schedule regardless of need

recommended_fixes: Remove schedule.every(30).minutes loop — only call run_cycle() on external trigger (cron with task injection, Telegram command, etc.)
Add proper shutdown signal handling (SIGTERM, SIGINT) with graceful exit
Switch model from claude-sonnet-4-20250514 to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (~12x cheaper)
Add cost_guard with hard stop ($1/day limit) instead of just warning
Change trigger to event-driven: only process when (1) task injected to queue, or (2) manual Telegram command received
